login.title: Log in
login.subtitle: Log in to scan your products
login.meta_title: Login to YumiScan - Find your Allergen Scans
login.meta_description: Log in to your YumiScan account to access your label scan history and your free credits.

signup.title: Create an account
signup.subtitle: Sign up to scan your products
signup.success_desc_confirm: Your account has been created. Check your email to confirm it, then log in.
signup.err_identity: First name and last name are required.
signup.err_profile: Account created, but error saving profile.
signup.password_desc: Min. 12 chars, 1 uppercase, 1 lowercase, 1 number, 1 special character
signup.allergens_note: Pre-checked for every scan. Modifiable in My Account.
signup.consent_accept: I have read and accept the Terms of Service and health warning.
signup.meta_title: Create a YumiScan account (3 Free Scans Included)
signup.meta_description: Sign up for free on YumiScan, the AI app that detects allergens (gluten, soy...) on international food packaging.

1.title: Automated Results
1.content: The results provided by YumiScan are generated automatically by OCR algorithms and probabilistic artificial intelligence. These systems can produce incomplete, inaccurate, or erroneous results. No analysis is 100% guaranteed.
1.warning: I acknowledge that the results may contain errors.

2.title: Non-exhaustive Detection
2.content: YumiScan does not guarantee the exhaustive detection of all allergens present in a product. Some allergens may be missing from the analysis due to image quality, ambiguous naming, or an unrecognized derivative form (traces, hidden allergens).
2.warning: I understand that the application does not guarantee exhaustive allergen detection.

3.title: Your Responsibility
3.content: By using YumiScan, you are solely responsible for your dietary decisions. The application is a decision support tool, not a certified medical or diagnostic device. In the event of a severe allergy, always check the original product packaging.
3.warning: I acknowledge that I remain solely responsible for my dietary decisions.

4.title: Limitation of Liability & TOS
4.content: The publisher of YumiScan cannot be held liable, directly or indirectly, for any physical, allergic, or health damage resulting from an analysis error, omission of an ingredient, or misinterpretation of the results. By signing up, you accept YumiScan's Terms of Service and Privacy Policy.
4.warning: I accept the TOS, the privacy policy, and the publisher's limitation of liability.

forgot_password.title: Forgot Password
forgot_password.desc: Enter your email and we will send you a link to reset your password.
forgot_password.success_desc: A password reset link has been sent to {email}. Remember to check your spam folder.

reset_password.title: New Password
reset_password.desc: Choose a new password for your account.
reset_password.link_expired: This link has expired or is no longer valid. Please request a new link from the Forgot Password page.

confirm.ready_email_change_desc: Tap the button below to finish confirming your new email address. This extra step prevents automatic previews from consuming the link before you do.
confirm.ready_current_desc: Tap the button below to confirm this request from your current email address.
confirm.loading_desc: We are validating your confirmation link.
confirm.email_change_pending_second_desc: The confirmation from the new address has been recorded. If your security configuration requires it, finish the process from the current email address now.
confirm.email_change_success_desc: Your email address has been validated. You can now continue with your account.
confirm.email_change_reauth_desc: Your email address has been validated. To finish cleanly, please log in again with your new address.
confirm.email_change_current_desc: The confirmation from your current email has been recorded. If a second confirmation is required, finish the process from the new address.
confirm.generic_success_desc: Your confirmation link has been processed successfully.
confirm.error_desc: This confirmation link can no longer be used. Please retry from the app if needed.

contact.title: Contact
contact.desc: A question, feedback, or suggestion? Fill out the form below.
